description: MCP server exposing the ClinicalTrials.gov REST API for discovering, retrieving, and analyzing clinical-study records.

tools.name: clinicaltrials_list_studies
tools.description: Search and paginate through clinical studies using flexible query objects.

query.description: Optional query object (e.g., {"term":"diabetes"}) that defines search filters.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of studies to return in this page (1-1000).

pageToken.description: Pagination token returned by a previous call to retrieve the next page.

format.description: Response format; always "json" for MCP usage.

studies.description: List of matching studies with brief metadata.

nctId.description: The unique ClinicalTrials.gov identifier (NCT ID) of the study.

briefTitle.description: Short public title of the clinical study.

overallStatus.description: Current recruitment/review status of the study.

conditions.description: Medical conditions addressed by the study.

interventions.description: Drugs, devices, procedures, or behavioral interventions being studied.

nextPageToken.description: Token to supply in the next request to continue pagination; absent when no more pages exist.

totalCount.description: Total number of studies matching the query across all pages.

tools.name: clinicaltrials_get_study
tools.description: Retrieve full protocol, results, and derived sections for one or more studies by NCT ID.

nctIds.description: Comma-separated list of ClinicalTrials.gov NCT IDs to fetch.

studies.description: Detailed study records for each requested NCT ID.

nctId.description: The unique ClinicalTrials.gov identifier (NCT ID) of the study.

protocolSection.description: Comprehensive protocol information including design, eligibility, and contacts.

resultsSection.description: Reported outcomes, adverse events, and participant flow after study completion.

derivedSection.description: Computed or enriched metadata such as calculated completion dates.

tools.name: clinicaltrials_search_studies
tools.description: Quickly find studies using high-level filters for condition, intervention, location, and status.

condition.description: Disease or medical condition being studied.

intervention.description: Drug, device, procedure, or behavioral intervention under investigation.

location.description: Geographic location such as city, state, or country where recruitment occurs.

status.description: Study recruitment or review status (e.g., recruiting, active, completed).

pageSize.description: Maximum number of studies to return (1-1000).

studies.description: Array of study summaries matching the provided filters.

totalCount.description: Total number of studies matching the filters across all pages.

tools.name: clinicaltrials_get_results
tools.description: Obtain reported results, outcome measures, adverse events, and participant flow for a single study.

nctId.description: The unique ClinicalTrials.gov identifier (NCT ID) whose results are requested.
The unique ClinicalTrials.gov identifier (NCT ID) of the study.

outcomeMeasures.description: Primary and secondary outcome measures with analyzed data points.

adverseEvents.description: Summary tables of adverse events reported by arm and severity.

participantFlow.description: Diagram and numbers detailing participant progression through trial phases.

tools.name: clinicaltrials_analyze_trends
tools.description: Aggregate statistics on groups of trials by a chosen attribute such as phase, status, condition, or sponsor.

query.description: Query object used to select the cohort of studies to analyze.

group_by.description: The attribute used for grouping the selected studies.

buckets.description: Count of studies falling into each distinct value of the grouping attribute.

key.description: Distinct value of the grouping attribute (e.g., "Phase 2").

count.description: Number of studies that share this key value.

totalCount.description: Total number of studies included in the analysis.
